title: centaurea dissecta var. tomentosa
intro: Centaurea dissecta var. tomentosa, also known as Woolly Centaury, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Centaurea dissecta var. tomentosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically to promote healing and relief from symptoms.
